scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm --filter @genui/protocol check && pnpm --filter @genui/genui check
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json packages/protocol/package.json packages/protocol/tsconfig.json packages/protocol/src packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json packages/protocol/package.json packages/protocol/tsconfig.json packages/protocol/src packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src
